goal: Keep the user emotionally safe while moving them one step closer to a qualified private conversation.
assumptions: A steady human tone increases trust more than a flashy reply.
Public comment replies should avoid risky promises and heavy sales pressure.
evidence: Interaction context shows repeated interest in the case-study content.
reply_text: 当然可以，我们先把流程和适合你的方向讲清楚，再看要不要继续。你私信我，我把咨询步骤发给你。
